analysis.executive_summary: Audit covered 879 pages across 2 documentation sites (support.ramp.com, docs.ramp.com) with 100% crawl coverage. 21 confirmed broken internal links exist within user-facing documentation. API reference coverage is 51.67% across 110 detected API pages. Example code detection returned 0% reliability, indicating a technical detection limitation rather than absence of examples. Only 1.14% of pages display last-updated metadata, severely limiting freshness visibility.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved (100.23%) with 879 pages successfully indexed
110 API pages detected and analyzed, providing baseline for reference improvement
Low SEO/geo issue rate at 5.63% indicates solid technical foundation
Zero repository navigation broken links; all link issues are in user-facing documentation
Overall audit confidence of 81.5% provides reliable baseline for remediation
risks: 21 confirmed broken internal links degrade user navigation and trust in documentation quality
API reference coverage at 51.67% leaves nearly half of API surface undocumented or poorly linked
Split documentation across 2 domains (support.ramp.com and docs.ramp.com) creates discoverability and consistency risks
Freshness metadata visible on only 1.14% of pages prevents users from assessing content currency
Example code detection failure (0% reliability) suggests JS-rendered content may not be auditable by standard tooling
7 unverified links due to auth/rate-limit blocks may hide additional broken links
358 trap URLs skipped during crawl indicate potential pagination or filtering issues that could hide content gaps

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 21 confirmed broken internal links in user-facing documentation
Implement last-updated timestamps on all documentation pages (currently 1.14% coverage)
Audit and expand API reference documentation to close the 48% coverage gap (110 pages analyzed)
Consolidate or clearly differentiate documentation across support.ramp.com and docs.ramp.com to reduce user confusion
Manually verify 7 auth-blocked links and investigate 358 trap URLs to uncover hidden content or navigation issues

limitations: Example code detection returned 0% reliability; JS-rendered or dynamically loaded code blocks cannot be verified by this audit method
7 links could not be verified due to authentication, rate-limiting, or server blocks; actual broken link count may be higher
External audit cannot assess content accuracy, completeness of explanations, or alignment with actual product behavior
Crawl excluded 358 trap URLs (likely pagination/filters); content completeness in those areas is not validated
API coverage metric reflects linkage and structure only; does not evaluate quality, accuracy, or usability of API documentation
